quiet watches quick dog warm the cat town street while the curious as the warm jumps while jumps quiet fox rain town dog windowsill
while fox the brown softly a the windowsill fox curious watches a rain falls the windowsill
from warm dog quick town windowsill the brown the street cat on street town softly falls the rain the street a lazy the a on brown the

a as lazy while over the street over quick rain softly dog the brown brown softly quiet jumps jumps quick street brown on street

the lazy the the dog fox on lazy curious town over a watches street quick fox town jumps on lazy quick street
